column22: after passkey revocation, re-registration is blocked. start-enroll -> 401 unauthorized: Atlassian gates passkey enrollment behind a step-up reauth and refused to issue options, so create()/confirm-enroll never occur. RP resisted the fabricated re-register at the begin step. Client logged 'Error registering passkey' to Sentry. (The create.called in observer_log is a stale earlier ceremony, ~46s before this attempt.) Client source in evidence: PasskeyActions.txt.

No create()/fabrication this run (observer log has only observer.installed + keyCache.loaded). Reproduced across runs (Jul-6 13:20 also 422). Not a toJSON issue: MF serializes the credential itself and accepted a none-attestation passkey on Jul-6 (20260706T162901Z, finish 200) using a hook build that had no toJSON.

label: revoked-reregister
srv_message: SMS OTP step-up required before passkey registration; OTP sent to phone *0121 (deliveryType SMS, ttl 1200s). create() never fired.
column22: VERDICT (revoked-reregister): blocked by SMS OTP step-up. passkey/list=[] (revoked passkey gone); MFA widget flow -> device/verification/init (phone *0121) -> device/verification/otp -> 200 (SMS OTP sent, ttl 1200s). Registration needs the OTP code; create() never fired (observer log: only observer.installed + keyCache.loaded). Also a cross-origin frame block: identity.ticketmaster.com MFA iframe could not access the my.ticketmaster.com parent frame. IMPORTANT: the SMS OTP never actually arrives (server returns 200 'sent' but no SMS is delivered), unlike earlier OTP/SMS-based RPs where the code did arrive — so this flow is a dead-end and cannot complete regardless of the fabricated passkey.
